description: Menu component (per-instance, no singleton). Light DOM <ul>/<li>/<sherpa-menu-item> content projected through <slot>. Uses popover="auto" for top-layer promotion and light-dismiss. CSS anchor positioning with JS fallback.

methods.name: show(anchor)
methods.description: Open and position the menu relative to anchor element

methods.name: getMenuTemplate(id)
methods.description: Return menu template HTML by id

properties.name: open
properties.description: Whether the menu is currently visible

properties.name: source
properties.description: The anchor element that opened the menu

properties.name: ready
properties.description: (static) Resolves when menu templates are loaded
